# Marina Alekseeva — Front-End Developer

> Front-End Developer with 4+ years of experience in React, Next.js, Angular, Vue, and TypeScript. Based in Santiago, Chile. Open to work.

## About

Marina Alekseeva is a front-end developer with deep expertise in the JavaScript ecosystem. She has professional experience building healthcare platforms, education tools with AI-powered learning, and pet health management apps. She speaks Russian (native), English (C2 Advanced), and Spanish (A2).

## Technical Skills

- Frameworks: React, Next.js, Angular, Vue, Svelte, Astro, Redux, Express
- Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, HTML, CSS, Dart
- Testing: Jest, Playwright, React Testing Library, Enzyme
- Infrastructure: Docker, AWS Lambda, Supabase, Redis, Git, Linux, Bash
- Concepts: OAuth2, OpenID, Functional Programming, SEO, Design Systems, i18n

## Work Experience

- ZooMinder (Dec 2025–Present): Co-Founder & Front-End Developer — Pet health management app with Flutter
- Previsible (Jun–Oct 2025): Web SEO Developer — Full-stack education platform with AI-powered learning tools
- Portavita Health (2023–2024): Front-end Developer — Healthcare MVP development
- Portavita LLC (2022–2023): Front-end Developer & Functional Tester — QA to development transition
